description_long: This is a tall, slender Christmas tree with a conical shape, featuring lush, vibrant green branches that are evenly spaced and gradually taper towards the top. The branches are dense and feathery, giving the tree a full and natural appearance, while the trunk is straight, textured, and brown, resembling real wood. The tree lacks any visible decorative ornaments, string lights, or artificial snow, maintaining a simple and classic look. There is no visible tree topper such as a star or angel at the peak. The base of the tree is not visible, suggesting it is designed to stand upright on its own. This tree would be suitable for placement in urban parks, plazas, or public spaces as a festive decoration.
description: A tall, lush green Christmas tree with a natural conical shape and a textured brown trunk, free of decorations or a topper.
description_view_0: The tree is seen from the front, showing its symmetrical, conical shape and evenly spaced branches.
description_view_1: This view highlights the tree's fullness and the density of its branches, with the trunk partially visible.
description_view_2: The tree appears slightly narrower from this angle, emphasizing the tapering of the branches towards the top.
description_view_3: This side view shows the layered structure of the branches and the straightness of the trunk.
